title: CHP Law
description: Schema for law.json — each law is a directory under docs/chp/laws/<name>/ containing law.json, verify.sh, and guidance.md

name.description: Law identifier. Must match the directory name.

severity.description: Default severity level for the law.

hooks.description: Which hook events this law attaches to.

enabled.description: Whether the law is actively enforced.

intent.description: Human-readable description of what the law enforces and why.

id.description: Unique identifier for this check within the law.

type.description: Checker type. Must have a matching core/checkers/<type>.sh.

config.description: Type-specific configuration. Pattern checks need a 'pattern' string.

severity.description: What happens when this check fails.

include.description: Glob patterns for files this law applies to. Required for git-hook laws (pre-commit, pre-push, post-commit, commit-msg, etc.). Agent-only laws are exempt.

exclude.description: Glob patterns exempt from this law. Overrides include patterns.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the law was created.

failures.description: Runtime counter — number of times this law has failed.

tightening_level.description: Runtime counter — how many times guidance has been auto-tightened.
